content.claim: National minority self-governments can become school maintainers under Act CLXXIX of 2011 where 75% of students receive minority education; as of September 2012, three schools had been transferred to the National Roma Self-Government, but uptake remains limited.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: Data point from 2012; current uptake rate not provided
Applicability to depopulating villages with high Roma populations not empirically linked in sources
Accountability structure of minority self-governments not detailed
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
